_doc: Top-level manifest. REQUIRED. First file any reader should parse.
_tensa_archive_version: Semver format version. REQUIRED. Readers reject unknown major versions. v1.1.0 (TENSA 0.79.5+) added six new optional layers — annotations, pinned_facts, revisions, workshop_reports, narrative_plan, analysis_status — required for /tensa-narrative-llm skill output to round-trip losslessly. Older v1.0.0 archives import cleanly; older readers ignore unknown layer keys.
_created_at: ISO 8601 datetime. REQUIRED. When the archive was created.
_created_by: OPTIONAL. Identifies the tool that created the archive. External tools should identify themselves.
_narratives: REQUIRED. List of narrative slug strings. Each must have a matching narratives/{slug}/ directory.

layers._state_versions: Entity property snapshots at each situation (state_versions.json).
layers._inference: Computed inference results (results.json). Regenerable — usually omitted.
layers._annotations: v1.1.0 — Inline annotations on situation prose (comments, footnotes, citations). Output of /tensa-narrative-llm dramatic-irony, subplots, etc. File: narratives/{slug}/annotations/annotations.json.
layers._pinned_facts: v1.1.0 — Continuity facts (W4). Output of /tensa-narrative-llm commitments. File: narratives/{slug}/pinned_facts/pinned_facts.json.
layers._revisions: v1.1.0 — Full narrative revisions (snapshot + author + message + parent chain). Output of /tensa-narrative-llm narrative-diagnose-and-repair. File: narratives/{slug}/revisions/revisions.json.
layers._workshop_reports: v1.1.0 — Three-tier workshop critique reports. File: narratives/{slug}/workshop_reports/workshop_reports.json.
layers._narrative_plan: v1.1.0 — Writer doc (logline, synopsis, premise, themes, plot beats, style targets). File: narratives/{slug}/plan/narrative_plan.json.
layers._analysis_status: v1.1.0 — Per-narrative analysis-status registry. Preserves Source: Skill + locked: true rows so a re-imported archive does NOT silently re-run skill-attested analyses. File: narratives/{slug}/analysis_status/entries.json.

_layers: REQUIRED. Boolean flags declaring which optional layers are present. Readers use this to skip missing dirs.
_strict_references: OPTIONAL (default: true). When false, dangling UUID references produce warnings instead of import errors. Set false for external creators who may not have all UUIDs.
_id_namespace: OPTIONAL. Opaque string identifying the source Tensa instance. Used for dedup heuristics.
description: Example archive showing all fields and their documentation.
_description: OPTIONAL. Human-readable description of the archive contents.
